lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
The vehicle is in poor condition. It requires significant mechanical repairs to be roadworthy. The exterior and interior show heavy wear, major cosmetic damage, and signs of neglect.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It shows no wear on the interior or exterior and is in perfect running order. It has been excellently maintained.

This vehicle is in mint condition and looks as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless with no scratches, chips, or dents, and the interior is immaculate, showing no signs of wear. Mechanically, it is in perfect working order, having been meticulously maintained with a complete service history and kept in a climate-controlled garage. This is a rare find for a collector or anyone seeking a like-new driving experience.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The exterior shows its age with substantial rust along the wheel wells, several large dents, and a clear coat that is peeling heavily on the hood and roof. Inside, the interior has seen better days; the upholstery is torn in multiple places, the headliner is sagging, and the air conditioning is currently non-functional. Mechanically, the car starts and runs, but it has a persistent oil leak, a rough idle, and the suspension makes significant noise over bumps. This vehicle is being sold strictly as-is and would be best suited as a project car for an enthusiast or for someone looking for a parts donor.

Step into luxury with this absolutely pristine vehicle! It’s in mint condition, looking and feeling as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. Every detail, from the flawless exterior to the immaculate interior, has been meticulously maintained. This is a rare find for anyone seeking a car that is truly like new!

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled caliber. This specimen has been preserved in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior environment. Meticulously maintained with a comprehensive service history, it represents the absolute pinnacle of its class. An acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it garage-kept and detailed regularly. You won’t find a single blemish on this beauty. It’s a total dream to drive and I'm only letting it go because I need something a bit bigger for the family. Come take a look, you won’t be disappointed!

This 2004 BMW M3 (E46) is a pristine example of high-revving naturally aspirated performance. At its heart lies the S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS system for optimized volumetric efficiency across the powerband. The Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox offers tactile gear selection, feeding power through a variable M-differential lock. This specimen boasts a reinforced rear subframe and a comprehensive rod-bearing service history, ensuring mechanical integrity. The chassis remains incredibly rigid, supported by a finely-tuned suspension with aluminum components for reduced unsprung mass. Finished in showroom-quality condition, this is a collector-grade icon of automotive engineering.
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Clean title. Garage kept. Inspection welcome.

This vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of automotive preservation, presenting in a state that can only be described as showroom-fresh. The original factory paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free from swirl marks, stone chips, or any superficial imperfections, thanks to a lifetime of climate-controlled garage storage and professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather upholstery remains supple with no visible bolster wear, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car aroma. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the intricate climate control sensors, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having followed a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule documented in a comprehensive service binder. The engine bay is detailed to a concours standard, and the undercarriage is remarkably clean, reflecting its history of fair-weather-only use. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector to acquire a piece of automotive excellence that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line.

Presented for your consideration is an exceptional vehicle in pristine condition. This specimen has been maintained to the highest standards, exhibiting no signs of wear and retaining its original showroom luster. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior upholstery, reflects a history of meticulous care. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of investment-grade quality that satisfies the most discerning automotive enthusiast.

We are pleased to present this exemplary automotive specimen, maintained in pristine, showroom condition. This vehicle reflects an uncompromising standard of care, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Meticulously inspected to ensure peerless mechanical integrity, this car offers an unrivaled driving experience for the discerning enthusiast who demands absolute excellence. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such distinguished caliber.

Hey there! I am absolutely thrilled to get this beauty into the hands of a new owner! This car is in truly pristine condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled right off the showroom floor. I’ve babied it since day one, so it’s sparkling clean and drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically flawless and ready for an adventure, you’ve found it! Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to chat!
This E46 M3 is a museum-grade example of the S54-powered legend. The high-revving 3.2L inline
Mint condition. Garage kept. Zero accidents. Full service history. Original paint. Interior is flawless.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is in absolute showroom condition. Finished in a deep, lustrous metallic paint that has been professionally ceramic coated, the exterior is devoid of any chips, swirl marks, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather upholstery still retains its factory scent, with no bolster wear or creasing. Every electronic component, from the adaptive suspension to the premium surround-sound system, functions precisely as it did the day it left the assembly line. Mechanically, this car has been pampered with an open-checkbook maintenance philosophy, documented by a complete binder of service records from authorized specialists. It has been exclusively garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment and has never seen inclement weather. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this is the one. Turn-key ready and indistinguishable from new.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, presented in showroom condition. The exterior retains a flawless, high-luster finish, while the interior remains pristine and free of any discernible wear. Mechanically, the vehicle operates with absolute precision, reflecting a history of meticulous maintenance and climate-controlled storage. For the discerning buyer seeking an uncompromising example, this motorcar offers an unparalleled ownership opportunity.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled caliber. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom condition, reflecting a standard of care that borders on the obsessive. Every surface, mechanical component, and interior detail has been preserved to an exacting degree, offering the discerning collector or enthusiast an experience indistinguishable from new. This is an uncompromising investment for those who demand nothing short of perfection.

Hey friends! I'm parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly mint condition—it's been pampered since day one and honestly looks and smells brand new! If you're looking for a flawless ride that’s been loved every mile, this is the one for you. I’m super excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have!
Used car. Condition: mint.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Service records available. Inspections welcome.
Used car. Condition: mint.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been preserved in a state of absolute refinement, exhibiting a level of care that borders on the extraordinary. From its flawless exterior contours to its pristine, showroom-quality interior, every facet of this automobile remains in impeccable condition. It offers the performance and aesthetic integrity of a new vehicle, catering specifically to the discerning client who demands the definitive standard in pre-owned luxury.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, reflecting meticulous ownership and an uncompromising maintenance history. Every surface, mechanical component, and interior detail adheres to the highest standards of excellence. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly investment-grade motorcar.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one, kept it garage-parked, and it’s spotless inside and out. If you’re looking for a ride that feels and smells brand new without the factory price tag, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you’re going to love it!

Offering an impeccable E92 M3, a definitive example of high-revving engineering. This specimen features the legendary S65 naturally aspirated V8, utilizing eight individual throttle bodies and a dual-overhead cam setup to achieve its 8,400 RPM redline. Mechanically pristine, the rod bearings and throttle actuators have been preemptively serviced to ensure long-term reliability. The M-DCT dual-clutch transmission provides lightning-fast gear synchronization, while the M-Variable differential maintains optimal torque distribution across the rear axle. The chassis remains rigid with zero subframe fatigue, and the factory-spec suspension geometry offers surgical precision. Finished with an unblemished carbon fiber roof and original paint, this is a collector-grade vehicle for the discerning purist seeking visceral performance.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. No accidents. Original paint. Clean title. Inspections welcome.

Presenting an absolute gem in showroom condition. This vehicle has been fastidiously maintained and garage-kept its entire life, resulting in a flawless exterior with a deep, glass-like finish free of chips or scratches. The interior is equally immaculate, featuring pristine leather seats that show zero signs of wear, original floor mats, and a cabin that still carries a hint of that new-car scent. Every component, from the precision-tuned engine to the smallest interior switch, operates exactly as intended. Complete with a comprehensive service history and zero curb rash on the factory-original wheels, this car is a true collector-grade example. It offers a rare chance to own a vehicle that looks and drives like it just rolled off the assembly line.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, preserved in pristine showroom condition. This specimen exhibits no discernible wear, reflecting a rigorous standard of maintenance that satisfies the most exacting requirements. A definitive acquisition for the discerning buyer seeking uncompromising quality and mechanical integrity.
